title: athyrium bourgaei
intro: Athyrium bourgaei, also known as the Mountain Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Athyrium bourgaei include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever, as well as its potential in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Athyrium bourgaei typically involve drying the plant's fronds and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
